name: Searchspring
description: Searchspring — E-commerce search, merchandising, and personalization platform for Shopify and BigCommerce.

seo.title: Searchspring — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Searchspring: Searchspring — E-commerce search, merchandising, and personalization platform for Shopify and BigCommerce.

when_to_use: Shopify and BigCommerce search and merchandising
AI-powered product discovery for mid-market e-commerce
Faceted navigation with search-driven category pages
Personalized search based on purchase history
Merchandising rules for promoted products in search

pros: E-commerce-specific search and merchandising in one stack
Strong fit for Shopify Plus and BigCommerce brands
Merchandising UI empowers category managers directly
Mature platform with specialized retail partners
cons: Premium pricing relative to Doofinder or Klevu
Harder to customize UIs outside supported platforms
Implementation can take weeks with a partner
Overkill for small catalogs under 5k SKUs
review.verdict: Serious e-commerce search and merchandising for mid-market retailers; pricy for SMBs but proven for mid-catalogs.
review.best_for: Mid-market Shopify Plus and BigCommerce retailers with active merchandising teams.
review.not_for: SMBs, headless custom storefronts, or content-first sites.
